channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 16 of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL playoff picture has nearly come into full focus with two weeks remaining in the regular season. Even on a short week, there's still a lot to play for.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How name, image and likeness laws have changed college sports
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled in 2021 the NCAA could not prevent student athletes from profiting from their game. Since the decision, legal fights have continued between the NCAA and US states.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boise State's legacy includes winning coaches and championship moments
item.description: Former Boise State coach Chris Petersen still gets asked about the Fiesta Bowl victory over Oklahoma on the first day of 2007. That game had everything.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Players have mixed feelings about being on the road on Christmas as NFL adds more holiday games
item.description: OWINGS MILLS, Md. (AP) — Asked if there was any special meaning to playing on Christmas for a second straight season, Lamar Jackson paused for several seconds before answering. That said it all. “I mean, it is,” he finally replied, trying to be diplomatic.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: USC's JuJu Watkins is AP women's basketball player of the week
item.description: The Associated Press national player of the week in women’s basketball for Week 7 of the season: JuJu Watkins, USC The sophomore guard shined in the Trojans' 72-70 victory over UConn, scoring 25 points with six rebounds, five assists and three blocks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Olympic snowboarder Sophie Hediger, 26, dies in avalanche in Switzerland
item.description: Swiss Olympic snowboarder Sophie Hediger was killed after an avalanche struck a resort where she was, officials said on Tuesday. She was 26.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Wemby at The Garden. LeBron vs. Steph. The NBA's Christmas Day lineup, as always, has star power
item.description: LeBron James made his Christmas debut in 2003. Victor Wembanyama was born 10 days later. That's right: James has been featured on the NBA's big day for longer than Wembanyama has been alive.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tales from the tour in a year filled with medals and tears and a few digs
item.description: Scottie Scheffler won a lot of tournaments and had to do a lot of talking this year. One theme stood out even as Scheffler was dominating his competition by winning nine times. The answer could be found on a white board in Paris.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How transgenderism in sports shifted the 2024 election and ignited a national counterculture
item.description: Fox News Digital explores how transgenderism in sports impacted the national election in 2024, and the stories of those were affected.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark has been named the AP Female Athlete of the Year after raising the profile of women’s basketball to unprecedented levels in both college and the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Packers clinch playoff berth with 1st shutout in NFL this season, 34-0 over Saints
item.description: With a dominant defense leading the way, the Green Bay Packers clinched a playoff berth by producing their most lopsided win in a decade.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Panthers Tkachuk helped off the ice after collision with Tampa Bay's Kucherov
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk had to be helped off the ice and taken to the locker room following a collision with Tampa Bay's Nikita Kucherov during Monday night's game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods, ex-wife Elin Nordegren share hug following golf tournament
item.description: Tiger Woods and his ex-wife Elin Nordegren shared a warm embrace after the PNC Championship as their son, Charlie, nailed a hole-in-one.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sabrina Ionescu is joining Unrivaled as the new 3-on-3 league's final player
item.description: Sabrina Ionescu was thrilled to be part of Unrivaled — the new 3-on-3 league. The Liberty star guard who helped New York win the first championship in franchise history earlier this year signed a historic agreement on Monday with the league.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas, Arizona State to meet in CFP clash of old vs. new Big 12 champs
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas won the Big 12 title in 2023 on its way out the door to the Southeastern Conference. It was still swinging open when Arizona State waltzed in and won the league title in its debut season.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dallas Wings hire USC assistant Chris Koclanes as head coach
item.description: The Dallas Wings hired Chris Koclanes as the franchise's new head coach, the team announced Monday. Koclanes has more than a decade of experience as an assistant coach in the WNBA and Division I women's basketball.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers eliminated from NFC playoffs before game against Miami. Cowboys, Saints, Cardinals also out
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The defending NFC champion San Francisco 49ers were eliminated from the playoffs before their game at Miami began on Sunday because of victories by Washington and the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: High-scoring Lions' fast start too much for Bears, Chicago loses 9th in a row
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears spotted the Detroit Lions an early 20-0 lead and despite catching their groove midway through the game, Chicago came up short for the second time this season against Detroit.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: College Football Playoffs looks for good matchups after snoozy first round of blowouts
item.description: For those who dozed through it, or flipped to more compelling fare in the NFL, here's a brief recap of the rollout of the much-anticipated College Football Playoff. Average final score: Winners 36, Losers 17.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls face the Celtics on 3-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (21-6, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-15, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago will look to keep its three-game win streak going when the Bulls take on Boston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UCSD basketball heating up, Tritons on a tear after historic upset
item.description: Fresh after pulling off what might be one of the biggest wins in program history, UCSD men's basketball has no plans on slowing down.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Caprock Hockey hangs tough with defending State Champion Durango
item.description: In their second-ever varsity home game, the Caprock Eagles once again had a tough test, this time with the defending 4A State Champion Durango Demons.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Guenther scores twice as Utah HC beats Minnesota, 2-1
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is in seventh heaven right about now. Dylan Guenther scored twice, including the game-winner at 10:01 of the third period, as Utah ran its road winning streak to seven in a row Friday night with a hard-fought 2-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: A parade, 5K and tailgate party: San Diego ramps up for Holiday Bowl
item.description: With the 45th annual DIRECTV Holiday Bowl matchup between Syracuse and Washington State just about a week away, San Diego is hosting a lineup of events leading up to the big game.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
